description_long: This is a heavily crushed and discarded Coca-Cola aluminum can, showing significant wear and tear. The can's red and white branding is still visible, though the surface is marred by dirt, grime, and dark stains. The top of the can is deformed, with the opening area bent inward and the pull tab missing or obscured. The cylindrical body is compressed and misshapen, with deep creases and dents running along its length. The printed label is partially legible, with the iconic Coca-Cola script and some product information visible. The overall appearance suggests the can has been exposed to the elements and possibly run over or stepped on in an urban environment.
description: A crushed, dirty Coca-Cola can with visible dents, stains, and a deformed top. The red and white branding is partially legible amid grime and damage.
description_view_0: The can's side is shown with the Coca-Cola logo partially visible, deep dents, and dark stains on the red surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the can's severe compression and the white Coca-Cola script, with more visible grime and a pronounced bend.
description_view_2: The top of the can is visible, showing a crushed opening and missing pull tab, with the label text partially readable on the side.
description_view_3: The can is viewed from above, emphasizing the warped top rim and the twisted, pinched body with streaks of dirt.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo in cursive on a red background, partially visible and distorted by dents.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola. Blended and bottled by Coca-Cola Ltd. FFA 9781. Contenido neto 355 ml.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Multiple dents, deep creases, dark stains, and dirt marks are visible across the can's surface, especially on the body and top rim.

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
